title: Task item (GET /tasks)
description: One tracker task row — the full as-built row minus lease secrets. As-built source of truth: the `tasks` table + ensureColumns() additive columns in /home/docker/tasks/src/lib/server/db.js (the tasks app remains the single writer). claim_token (the lease capability secret) is scrubbed and NEVER served (db.js deepScrub / SECRET_COLS); claimed_by and lease_expires_at are NOT secrets and ship on purpose. Timestamps are stored as SQLite 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS' UTC; the console read serves them normalized to RFC 3339 UTC. Filters: `status`, `project_id`, `assignee`, `since`, plus the shared limit/cursor. Consumers MUST ignore unknown fields.

kind.description: task | idea | doc | question (as-built values; free TEXT column, treat unknown kinds as opaque).

parent_id.description: Parent task for sub-task hierarchy; null = top-level.

assignee.description: Which agent/human owns it; empty = unassigned.

claimed_by.description: Agent holding the active lease; empty = unclaimed. NOT a secret (the token is).

lease_expires_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC lease expiry (reapable after); null/absent = no live lease.

blocked_on.description: Human-readable blocking note (the typed blocking graph lives in task_blockers, not on this row).

verification_status.description: Janet's verification of the worker's result against acceptance_criteria.

effort.description: Rough size hint (e.g. xs|s|m|l); free text.

parallel_group.description: Tasks in the same group may run concurrently (routing hint).

rank.description: Manual order within a lane ('do this then that'), NOT priority. REAL in the store.

up_next.description: In the Up Next lane. Stored as INTEGER 0/1; served as boolean.

owner.description: Who created/owns it (authentik username; drives the private-visibility gate).

visibility.description: private = owner-only for humans. The console serves rows per the caller's scope (ReBAC below the tools); agents' reads may see all per the tracker's trust boundary.

handoff_context.description: Just-enough context for the worker picking it up.

acceptance_criteria.description: What 'done' means; verification is judged against this.

close_reason.description: Why it closed (the 'why' ledger; required by the close tool, not yet by every status-edit path).

created_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC (normalized from the store's SQLite datetime).

updated_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC (normalized). The `since` filter keys on this.

capability.description: Capability tag the work needs (build|research|web|...); checked against the agents registry in agentCan().

owner_machine.description: Which host should run it (routing hint, advisory).

responsible.description: Human accountable for completion (parker|elisha); distinct from assignee (agent).

body_alt.description: 'Human version' — plain-english rewrite of body (reader toggle).

options.description: JSON [{value,label}] for kind='question' (serialized string, as stored).

answer.description: Chosen value for kind='question'; empty = unanswered.

project_title.description: Joined project name (the BoardCard chip; no separate /projects read needed).
